description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts and practical usage, gauging both foundational and advanced skills through multiple‑choice questions. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a light‑hearted, encouraging tone that motivates learners to consider CSS as a résumé‑worthy skill. The teaching style is informal yet informative, aiming to boost confidence while highlighting key CSS capabilities.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, Modern layout techniques (Flexbox, Grid), Responsive design, CSS preprocessors and variables, Browser compatibility
Audience: Web developers and designers with basic CSS experience who want to evaluate and deepen their modern CSS proficiency.
